videoSnippet.title: 6 Brilliant Moves in a Row!
videoSnippet.description:

Sasikiran, Krishnan (2538) - Eren, Ataberk (2391) 1-0
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.03.04
C88 Ruy Lopez, closed, anti-Marshall 8.a4

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O Be7 6.Re1 b5 7.Bb3 O-O 8.a4 Bb7 9.d3 d6 10.h3 Na5 11.Ba2 c5 12.Nbd2 bxa4 13.Nf1 c4 14.Ng3 cxd3 15.Qxd3 Bc6 16.Nf5 Bb5 17.Qc3 Nb7 18.N3h4 Kh8 19.Nxe7 Qxe7 20.Nf5 Qd7 21.Qf3 Ne8 22.Bg5 f6 23.Nh4 Nc7 24.Be3 Ne6 25.Qg4 Rfe8 26.Nf5 g6 27.Nh6 Rac8 28.Qh4 Rf8 29.Ng4 Bc4 30.b3 axb3 31.cxb3 Bb5 32.b4 Bc4 33.Bh6 g5 34.Qg3 Rf7 35.Bxc4 Rxc4 36.Rxa6 Rxb4 37.Qc3 Rb5 38.Ra8+ Nbd8 39.Qc4 d5 40.Qa2 Nc7 41.Ra7 Nc6 42.Rxc7 Qxc7 43.Rc1 Qb7 44.exd5 Ne7 45.d6 Ng8 46.Rc8 Qd5 47.Rxg8+ Kxg8 48.d7 Qd6 49.Qe6 Rb1+ 50.Kh2 Rd1 51.Nxf6+ Kh8 52.d8=Q+ Qxd8 53.Qxf7
